name: evolutiondb-memory
description: Persistent long-term memory for Claude. Backed by EvolutionDB; what you tell Claude in one chat is recallable in every future chat.
long_description: Drops in a `save_memory` / `search_memory` / `recent_memories` / `forget` / `list_tags` tool surface so Claude can remember preferences, decisions, biographical details, and project context across sessions. Backed by EvolutionDB (open source, runs in one Docker container) over the PostgreSQL wire protocol — no opaque blob storage, every fact is a real row you can `SELECT` against. Namespace-pinned server-side from the `MCP_USER_ID` env var to keep the LLM from fragmenting the namespace across sessions.

tools.name: save_memory
tools.description: Persist a long-term fact about the user.

tools.name: recent_memories
tools.description: List the most recently saved facts.

tools.name: forget
tools.description: Delete a stored fact by its key.

tools.name: list_tags
tools.description: List all distinct tags used so far.

evosql_host.title: EvolutionDB host
evosql_host.description: Host where EvolutionDB is reachable (PostgreSQL wire protocol).

mcp_user_id.title: Your namespace identifier
mcp_user_id.description: Sticky user_id for every memory Claude writes through this extension. Anything you set here scopes your private memory namespace and stops the LLM from drifting it across sessions.

mcp_store_prefix.title: Catalog store prefix
mcp_store_prefix.description: Prefix for the auto-created MEMORY STORE / ENTITY STORE catalog objects.
